testcase.name: EDINET.EC8077W
testcase.description: EDINET.EC8077W: For semi-annual securities reports, the financial statements must be tagged using the appropriate semi-annual role URIs that match the WhetherConsolidatedFinancialStatementsArePreparedDEI value.

variation.name: invalid01
variation.description: Form 4-3 semi-annual report, Japan GAAP, WhetherConsolidatedFinancialStatementsArePreparedDEI=true, but consolidated financial statements are tagged using annual (rol_Consolidated*) role URIs instead of the required semi-annual (rol_SemiAnnualConsolidated*) role URIs.

variation.name: invalid02
variation.description: Form 4-3 semi-annual report, Japan GAAP, WhetherConsolidatedFinancialStatementsArePreparedDEI=false, but non-consolidated financial statements are tagged using annual (rol_BalanceSheet, rol_StatementOfIncome, rol_StatementOfCashFlows-indirect) role URIs instead of the required semi-annual (rol_Type1SemiAnnual*) role URIs.
